title: Select the album cover photo by clicking
author: marenamat
body: I wanna choose the album cover photo in the thumnail page by clicking a button or so.
comments: works but is not set → the `og:image` property is not set, and also `og:image:alt` needs another item in the thumbnail editor page
also! the photo pages have the property set but the url is ignored, check e.g. https://alb.jmq.cz/2025-10-barcelona/photos/157.html
